creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Committed, thanks! 

Please note that in the meantime, a new version has been released 
(6.3.20131221); would you consider upgrading it? 

Please also consider defining the license (seems GPLv2), and also run 
mkfontdir and mkfontscale? It's not mandatory, but it can help some 
applications.
